title: T-035 — Expiry calc on GRN ingest
prompt:
# T-035 — Expiry calc on GRN ingest

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §12.1 (FR-WH-020), V-WH-EXP-001.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
During GRN complete (T-021/T-022), compute LP.expiry_date and LP.date_code_rendered when GRN row omits explicit expiry.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/expiry-calc.ts` exposes `computeExpiryAndDateCode(grnRow, product)` returning {expiry_date, date_code_rendered, shelf_life_mode_snapshot}. Logic: if grnRow.expiry_date present → use; else expiry = manufacture_date + product.shelf_life_days. date_code_rendered uses 03§9.2 format from product.date_code_format. shelf_life_mode_snapshot copied from product.shelf_life_mode.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/expiry-calc.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/expiry-calc.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given product.shelf_life_days=90 and manufacture_date=2026-01-01 with no explicit expiry, when computed, then expiry=2026-04-01.
2. Given grnRow.expiry_date=2026-05-15, when computed, then result equals 2026-05-15 (operator override wins).
3. Given product.date_code_format='YYWW' and date 2026-04-01 (week 14), when computed, then date_code_rendered='2614'.

## Test strategy
- RED: expiry-calc.test.ts covers three scenarios.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test expiry-calc`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not silently overwrite explicit expiry.
- Do not assume shelf_life_days when neither manufacture_date nor explicit expiry provided (surface error).
- Do not import LP table here — pure function.

pipeline_inputs.description: Pure expiry/date_code calculator used by GRN ingest.
pipeline_inputs.details: Operator-explicit expiry wins. date_code_format covers YYWW/YYYY-MM-DD/JJWW/YYJJJ. Errors if neither expiry nor manufacture_date+shelf_life_days available.
out_of_scope: GRN ingest wiring (T-021/T-022 already consume this)
acceptance_criteria: Given shelf_life_days=90 and manufacture_date=2026-01-01 with no explicit expiry, when computed, then expiry=2026-04-01
Given grnRow.expiry_date=2026-05-15, when computed, then result equals 2026-05-15
Given format='YYWW' and date=2026-04-01 (ISO week 14), when computed, then date_code_rendered='2614'
risk_red_lines: Do not overwrite explicit operator expiry
Do not assume defaults when manufacture_date missing
Do not import LP DB module
